description: A reporter receives an anonymous tip about corruption at a government agency. They must try to verify the information before proceeding.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the tip for specific, verifiable details (names, dates, project numbers).

expected_outcome.value: Agent extracts a list of concrete details from the tip.

nodes.task_description: Attempt to corroborate the details through public records or by finding a second, independent source who can confirm the information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a public document that supports one of the tip's claims.

nodes.task_description: Based on the verification, decide whether the tip is credible enough to warrant a full investigation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent makes an informed decision to either pursue or drop the story.
